name: octo-slow-checkout-spans
description: Checkout requests slower than 1s, correlated back to their log records. trace_id is the pivot column — click through to APM.
queryString: 'Log Source' = 'octo-shop-app-json' and route = '/api/orders' and Duration > 1000 | stats count(), avg(Duration), max(Duration) by oracleApmTraceId | sort -max(Duration) | head limit = 25
